description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult male pedestrian standing upright with arms at his sides. He is dressed in a casual outfit consisting of a long-sleeve shirt and straight-cut jeans, paired with sturdy shoes. The figure's facial features are neutral, and his hair is short and neatly styled. The clothing fits loosely, suggesting comfort and practicality for urban environments. The model is proportioned realistically, with natural body contours and limb positioning. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is that of an everyday city dweller.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian stands upright with a neutral expression, wearing a long-sleeve shirt, jeans, and sturdy shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person's face, chest, and both arms at his sides, with clear visibility of the shirt and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the side of the shirt and jeans, and the shoe shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, jeans, and both shoes, with arms hanging naturally.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, the side of the shirt and jeans, and the shoe outline.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt and straight-cut jeans
